reasoning_model_1: The user command required the model to read a specific sentence ('同学们，请安静！今天的班会我们将讨论下周的春游计划，大家有什么好的建议都可以积极发言。') with a loud volume. model_comparison: Model 1 failed to generate the complete audio, stopping after the first few words. This constitutes a critical failure in content accuracy. Model 2, on the other hand, generated the complete script with high fluency and successfully applied the 'loud volume' constraint, sounding like a teacher or student leader projecting their voice to the whole class.
